title: CodebaseContext
description: Output contract for the explore skill — elements discovered in the codebase relevant to test generation.

selectors.description: UI element selectors discovered in the codebase

element.description: Human-readable name or description of the element

quality.description: Reliability and specificity rating of the selector

file.description: Source file where the element was found

line.description: Line number in the source file

apiRoutes.description: API routes discovered for network interception and mocking

method.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, etc.)

url.description: URL path or pattern for the route

requestShape.description: Description or type name of the expected request body shape

responseShape.description: Description or type name of the expected response shape

file.description: Source file where the route is defined

existingFactories.description: Test data factories discovered in the codebase

name.description: Name of the factory function or class

entity.description: The data entity or model this factory produces

file.description: Source file where the factory is defined

overrides.description: List of fields that can be overridden when calling the factory

existingFixtures.description: Playwright fixtures discovered in the codebase

capabilities.description: What the fixture sets up or provides

file.description: Source file where the fixture is defined

authPattern.description: Authentication pattern and helpers discovered in the codebase

apiShortcut.description: Playwright API route shortcut for bypassing the UI login flow

storageStateFile.description: Path to a saved storage state file for session reuse

testConventions.description: Conventions inferred from existing test files

namingPattern.description: Detected naming pattern for spec files (e.g. *.spec.ts)

folderStructure.description: Detected folder structure for test files

tagUsage.description: Tags or annotations in use across existing specs

existingSpecCount.description: Total number of existing spec files found
